homepage.title: Martin Rhodes | Labour MP For Glasgow North
homepage.meta_description: Martin Rhodes is the elected Member of Parliament for Glasgow North.
headings: h2: Follow me on Social Media
homepage.text_excerpt: Martin Rhodes | Labour MP For Glasgow North Martin Rhodes MP MP for Glasgow North Local Surgeries Newsletter Sign Up What can an MP do Contributions Contact Local Surgeries Newsletter Sign Up What can an MP do Contributions Contact Standing up for Glasgow North Martin Rhodes is the elected Member of Parliament for Glasgow North – covering Acre, Anderston, Cadder, Cleveden, Colston, Cowcaddens, Finnieston, Firhill, Garnethill, Gilshochill, Hamiltonhill, Hillhead, Kelvinbridge, Kelvindale, Kirklee, Lambhill, Maryhill, Milton, North Kelvin, Park, Parkhouse, Possilpark, Port Dundas, Ruchill, St. George’s Cross, Summerston, Woodlands, Woodside, Wyndford, Yorkhill and parts of City centre and Cowlairs I’m committed to representing the people of Glasgow North, working hard to address your concerns and ensuring your voice is heard in Parliament. Martin Rhodes MP Contact Martin Parliamentary protocol dictates that MPs can only deal with casework for residents within their constituency. Please include your full address in any correspondence. Name (Required) First Last Email (Required) Phone (Required) Address (Required) Street Address City Post Code Is you query related to pensions, tax or benefits? Yes No Please include your NI number (Required) Is you query related to Immigration? Yes No Please include your Home Office reference number (Required) Please include your date of birth (Required) DD slash MM slash YYYY Message (Required) Would you like to sign up for our newsletter to get the latest on Martin’s work in Parliament and across the constituency? (Required) Yes No CAPTCHA By submitting this form I agree to the privacy policy (Required) I agree ( View Policy ) Local Surgeries Martin holds regular advice surgeries across the constituency, please contact the office on 0141 321 3821 or at contact@martinrhodes.uk to arrange an appointment. Glasgow North Constituency Find your local MP If you are not sure who your MP is – please use the following link. Find Your MP Follow me on Social Media Martin Rhodes MP 0141 321 3821 contact@martinrhodes.uk Unit 1, 76 Firhill Road, Glasgow, G20 7BA The House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA Cookie Policy | Manage Cookies | Privacy Policy Martin Rhodes © 2026. pages.title: Newsletter Sign Up | Martin Rhodes MP
pages.meta_description: Sign up to our newsletter to stay up to date with what Martin is doing
headings: h2: Stay up to date with Martin!
pages.text_excerpt: Newsletter Sign Up | Martin Rhodes MP Martin Rhodes MP MP for Glasgow North Local Surgeries Newsletter Sign Up What can an MP do Contributions Contact Local Surgeries Newsletter Sign Up What can an MP do Contributions Contact --> Newsletter Sign Up Stay up to date with Martin! Sign up for the newsletter to get the latest on Martin’s work in Parliament and across the constituency – from speaking up on national issues to supporting local campaigns and community events. Hear about upcoming surgeries, community news, and how Martin is working to make a difference both locally and nationally.
